prompt: I want to delete one entry from `PositionOutput` via a merge_key. Which spyglass skill reference do you consult first?
behavioral_checks: Names destructive_operations.md as the first reference (merge_methods.md acceptable as the second stop for the merge-specific classmethod-discard mechanics)
